projectName: Portfolio - Projects Minimalist Hover Showcase Revamp
description: Epic to fully transition the Projects section from filter-heavy interactions to a minimalist hover-first showcase with cyber-futuristic glitch detail reveals, modal-style hover previews, and full-card click-through project navigation.

reason: Remove all filter/search/sort controls from the Projects section
Shift visual direction toward cleaner minimalist presentation
Reveal richer details on hover/focus using cyber-futuristic glitch styling
Open detailed project view via card click to a configured destination link
Restore and fix project detail modal behavior for the Projects section
Keep the no-filter, hover-first visual model while using modal-first details on click
Ensure project links remain available from within the modal
Do not open project modal on click
Show modal-style project view on hover/focus
Open project destination link directly when card is clicked

inScope: Implement hover/focus cyber detail reveal with controlled glitch effects
Support optional hover media preview (video when available, image fallback)
Make the project card itself the primary interaction target
Show modal-style hover preview while keeping full-card external navigation
Preserve accessibility, reduced-motion, and keyboard parity
outOfScope: Creating new Next.js routes for project details
Reintroducing any search/filter/sort UI in Projects
Changing non-project sections outside required integration points

architecture: Projects section uses hover-first modal-style preview + click-through navigation
Project links open directly from card activation using detailURL > liveURL > repositoryURL
No additional page route for project details
Use existing Tailwind light/dark token classes
Use portfolio-resources/data/projects.json as source of truth
Do not break resume/experience/booking modal behavior

existingFoundation.projectSection: src/components/sections/ProjectsSection.tsx currently uses no-filter minimalist cards with hover/focus reveal, modal-style hover preview, and full-card link trigger
existingFoundation.projectModal: src/components/ui/ProjectDetailModal.tsx retained for optional non-project-card modal flows
existingFoundation.modalProvider: src/hooks/useModal.tsx keeps resume/experience/booking modal state and optional project support
existingFoundation.types: src/types/index.ts Project and ModalName include project-modal support and detailURL fallback

successMetrics.ux: Projects section contains zero filter/search/sort controls and looks intentionally minimalist
successMetrics.interaction: Hover/focus reveals cyber-styled details within 150ms without forcing click
successMetrics.navigation: Clicking/focusing-and-activating a project card opens the configured destination link using detailURL/liveURL/repositoryURL priority
successMetrics.a11y: Keyboard users can access the same reveal information via focus states
successMetrics.performance: No noticeable layout shift during hover or media transitions
successMetrics.maintainability: PRD and progress align with hover-first modal-style preview and click-through navigation direction

stories.title: Remove Search/Filter/Sort Control Surface
acceptanceCriteria: Remove search input from ProjectsSection
Remove category chips and tag dropdown
Remove sort selector and reset controls
Remove filter-result empty state tied to filter logic

technicalNotes.risk: Unused state/hooks left behind after control removal

stories.title: Simplify Projects Layout to Minimalist Card Stack
acceptanceCriteria: Reduce visual clutter and card chrome
Improve hierarchy for title/year/summary
Keep compact tag signals with strict truncation
Retain optional View all/Show less only when needed

technicalNotes.note: No new layout containers outside existing section card system

stories.title: Define Click-Through Data Contract
acceptanceCriteria: Add optional detailURL field to Project type
Optionally support previewVideoURL for hover media
Update projects source JSON with explicit detailURL mapping
Keep backward compatibility with liveURL/repositoryURL/processURL

technicalNotes.note: Do not introduce placeholder fake external links

stories.title: Implement Full-Card Click-Through Navigation
acceptanceCriteria: Entire card acts as a link target
Target resolution order is detailURL > liveURL > repositoryURL
Cards without target are visibly non-interactive
External navigation keeps noopener/noreferrer protection

technicalNotes.risk: Nested actionable elements causing invalid interaction model

stories.title: Add Cyber-Futuristic Hover/Focus Detail Reveal
acceptanceCriteria: Hover/focus reveals additional detail panel without clicking
Glitch aesthetic uses controlled effects (scanline, chromatic split, jitter)
Readability remains high under both themes
Animation timing remains smooth and deterministic

technicalNotes.motion: Prefer Framer Motion and avoid global CSS side effects

stories.title: Support Hover Media Preview (Video/Image)
acceptanceCriteria: If previewVideoURL exists, display muted looped preview on hover/focus
If previewVideoURL is absent, use optimized image fallback
No modal is required to inspect media
On touch/mobile, preview behavior degrades gracefully

technicalNotes.note: Preserve Next/Image optimization for image path

stories.title: Remove Project Modal from Runtime Flow
acceptanceCriteria: Remove openModal('project', ...) usage from ProjectsSection
Remove project modal state and registration from ModalProvider
Remove project modal name from shared modal union type
Delete obsolete ProjectDetailModal component and tests

technicalNotes.risk: Breaking unrelated modal flows if shared types are edited incorrectly

stories.title: Accessibility and Keyboard Parity for Hover-First UX
acceptanceCriteria: Focus state mirrors hover reveal of details
Enter key opens the same click-through link
Reveal-only metadata is accessible for keyboard navigation
ARIA labels remain meaningful and concise

stories.title: Reduced-Motion and Mobile Fallback Behavior
acceptanceCriteria: Reduce motion effects when prefers-reduced-motion is enabled
Ensure key details remain visible without hover availability
Keep touch interactions predictable with no hidden dead-ends
Avoid animated effects that obscure project content

stories.title: Performance Hardening for Hover Overlay and Media
acceptanceCriteria: No noticeable layout shift while revealing details
Media preview does not trigger excessive eager loading
Render paths avoid unnecessary list-wide re-renders
Maintain smooth interactions on mid-range mobile devices

technicalNotes.approach: Progressive enhancement and conservative animation cost

stories.title: Update Test Suites for No-Filter Hover-First Behavior
acceptanceCriteria: Add tests asserting search/filter/sort controls are absent
Add tests for click-through target priority
Add tests for focus/hover reveal semantics
Remove or replace obsolete modal-detail tests

stories.title: Finalize Docs, Progress Logs, Validation, and Dev Run
acceptanceCriteria: Align copilot-instructions Ralph section with active hover-first epic
Record completion notes in progress.txt with story references
Run lint, build, and relevant tests successfully
Start dev server for manual verification

stories.title: Restore Project Detail Modal Flow After User Feedback
acceptanceCriteria: Reintroduce project modal in modal union/provider runtime
Wire project card click interaction to open project modal with payload
Provide external project actions from inside the modal
Update tests and planning docs to match restored modal flow

technicalNotes.note: Keeps no-filter hover-first visual model while restoring modal-first project details

stories.title: Shift Project Interaction to Hover Preview + Click-Through Link
acceptanceCriteria: Project card click no longer opens a project modal
Hover/focus state reveals a modal-style project preview on-card
Card activation opens project destination via detailURL > liveURL > repositoryURL
Tests and planning artifacts reflect click-through behavior

technicalNotes.note: Preserves no-filter, hover-first aesthetic while removing click-to-modal behavior
